versions.description:
Control game server access with a configurable whitelist workflow in Takaro. This module helps community managers restrict entry, coordinate approved players, and keep access rules visible through permissions and commands.

Use this module to:

- Allow or deny access based on configured whitelist data.
- Give staff tools for managing approved players.
- Support private, application-based, or event-limited server communities.
versions.configSchema: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","required":[],"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"kickMessage":{"title":"kickMessage","description":"Message to display to players who are kicked for not having the required role.","default":"You do not have permission to join this server.","type":"string"}}}

hooks.name: whitelisting

permissions.description: Players with this permission can join the whitelisted server.
